name: Wizard Rui Kamishiro
description:
★ ★ ★ ★ ☆

"Tsukasa-kun, control your stars!"

This is an AU about a comic book I really like named 'While Yubooh Sleeps'. Idk if it's in English since the author is Chilean and I'm not sure if she's been able to publish her book outside of Latin America yet, but if not here's a very small synopsis

The story goes on about a girl named Yubooh. She's like super into witches and spooky stuff and one day gets accepted info Saturn Academy. But the thing is that said place is only for magic people, like her best friend, Salvia, and everyone who isn't magical getd rejected. But Yubooh somehow gets accepted so they turn on something called the 'fish code', in which magic is hidden until they know if the student is a wizard or not. And the story goes on and on blah blah

The important thing is that all magic users have "gifts" controlled by their emotions. Rui's for example would be to give life to inanimated objects for a set amount of time, and Tsukasa's is creating star shards he can use to attract or build stuff like shields. In the book, they replaced two of the main cast, Roo (Rui) and Esteban who originally creates crying fish instead of stars (Kasa). Esteban is very anxious due to the death of his parents and has refused to leave the academy for a while and since he's not in a good place mentally he can't fully control his gift and fish pop out of nowhere lol. That's Tsukasa and Rui well. He's there :p also Salvia is Nene, who has a healing gift (tho nene would have more of a singing related one) and Yubooh is Emu :3

Esteban (white hair) and Roo (black hair)

I'm sorry, Kazu has stepped back for a bit, but I'll try to give my best. I haven't been very motivated tho so they may come out as lazy :c this bot was something I did quickly, so it's Def not my best work. Magic elements aren't mentioned that often unless the bot decides to throw a shadow at you :b ALSOO pls try to regen the message if it starts Impersonating Tsukasa. I've tried a bunch of stuff but the bot keeps doing it

Bot made by Toriyama :3 boo the photo quality is very low
creator: Yama_zu
